rationale: setuptools extras_require for optional dependencies; pure packaging/build improvement, no spec involvement.
AttributeError on RawBSONDocument.copy() in internal update path; Python API bug, no spec rule violated.
Workaround for SERVER-24007 using 'replace' error handler; server bug workaround, not a spec deviation.
Deprecating MongoClient.kill_cursors for API ergonomics; no spec rule requires this specific public method.
Improvement implementing new GridFS spec methods; driver not wrong, spec added new requirements (Depends: DRIVERS-299).
Cursor indexing beyond limit returns unexpected results; no specific cursor spec rule on index-access semantics.
CursorNotFound with multiple mongos; user environment/topology issue, closed as resolved without code change.
C extension big-endian support; build/platform improvement, no spec rule involved.
Misleading documentation for deprecated custom type support; documentation bug only.
PEP 513 manylinux wheel distribution support; packaging improvement, no spec involvement.
Int64 should encode as Extended JSON $numberLong per spec; json_util.default was delegating to Python json instead.
Extended JSON $date serialization should support ISO-8601; driver only deserialized it, not serialized per spec.
UUID binary sub type should serialize as {$binary, $type} per Extended JSON spec; driver emits $uuid instead.
test_bad_encode fails on Python 2.6 due to recursion-limit-dependent exception type; test suite compat bug.
unicode_decode_error_handler and tzinfo missing from VALIDATORS; internal option-parsing bug, no spec rule violated.
GPG decryption error caused by libreadline symbol conflict in Anaconda environment; OS/environment issue.
UnicodeDecodeError on server response with invalid UTF-8; robustness issue, no spec conformance rule violated.
$maxDistance query crash; user question resolved quickly, no spec involvement indicated.
BSON spec distinguishes Code (0x0D) from CodeWithScope (0x0F); driver always encodes Code with empty scope as 0x0D.
Explicitly disabling TLS compression; security hardening improvement, no spec requirement involved.
Invalid ssl_certfile raises ssl.SSLError instead of ConfigurationError; error wrapping ergonomics, no spec rule.
Adding public attribute to expose IsMaster response document; API ergonomics improvement, not a spec deviation.
Adding topology_type_name and server_type_name convenience properties; API ergonomics, not a spec requirement.
Documentation improvement for SDAM monitoring API; docs only, no driver behavior change.
Document that PyMongo is not fork-safe; documentation addition only.
SDAM monitoring spec requires every started heartbeat event have a correlated succeeded or failed event; driver omits first failure event.
Reporting python implementation in handshake metadata; improvement adding more detail, no missing-required-field spec violation.
Adding os.name, os.architecture, os.version to handshake; enhancement to metadata richness, not correcting a missing required field.
Replacing unreleased strict_date boolean with datetime_representation enum before release; API design change, not a bug fix.
Making sockets non-inheritable to fix FD leak on exec; OS-level robustness improvement, no spec rule involved.
Documentation fix for incorrect MongoClient repr examples in high-availability docs; docs only.
Server-selection spec requires maxStaleness be sent in $readPreference to mongos; driver omitted it.
MongoReplicaSetClient ignores uuidRepresentation kwarg; internal API inconsistency within same driver, not cross-driver or spec.
Documentation fails to build/test under Python 3.x due to print-statement syntax; docs/build issue.
SSL timeout should raise NetworkTimeout not AutoReconnect; error-type classification improvement, no spec rule mandating this.
CI infrastructure: support running full test suite with TLS enabled; test environment improvement.
Doctests fail against newer MongoDB versions due to changed command output; documentation maintenance.
Wrong count() result after skip/limit; user misunderstanding of count(True) semantics, resolved without code change.
MongoClient.__repr__ crashes with Unix domain socket (None port); internal repr formatting bug, no spec rule violated.
Adding documentation examples for Unix domain socket connections; docs addition only.
Sphinx >= 1.3 compatibility fix in setup.py for doc build status checking; build tooling only.
Add 'Changed in version 3.0' section to API docs; documentation improvement only.
CI test failure: test_parallel_scan_max_time_ms not skipped on mongos; test suite skip-condition bug.
C extension memory leak in _cbson_element_to_dict using wrong Py_BuildValue format specifier; implementation bug, no spec rule.
Race condition in PeriodicExecutor causing flaky reconnect test; internal concurrency bug.
Responds to Max Staleness spec changes: rename, resync JSON tests, implement prose tests; spec adoption + test resync.
Remove hardcoded topology assumptions from internal test suite; internal test refactoring, not spec test infrastructure.
Gevent timeout during bulk operation; user support question about gevent compatibility, closed without code change.
CI test failure in test_mongos_load_balancing due to mock raising AutoReconnect; test infrastructure flakiness.
Test failure: test_last_write_date not skipped on standalone/mongos; test suite skip-condition bug.
